confidence_rationale: Loop deployment and cinching phases clearly visible, but exact positioning relative to marked line difficult to assess from camera angles. No obvious penalties observed but marking precision cannot be fully verified.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from marked line on appendage - marking not clearly visible in video frames
Precise measurement of loop tightness - can only assess visually that loop appears secure
technique_summary: Competent intermediate to novice performance with smooth loop deployment and placement. Primary time loss occurred during extended cinching phase (87s vs 20-40s expert benchmark). No major technical errors observed.
strengths: Controlled loop placement without dropping or tangling
improvement_suggestions: Reduce cinching time from 87s to under 30s for expert level
Work on faster but controlled movements during securing phase
